ground_truth: A practical 2025 travel guide to Amsterdam covering transport (Schiphol airport, GVB trams, cycling), must-see museums (Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum, Anne Frank House), neighbourhoods (Jordaan, Amsterdam-Noord, NDSM Wharf), and dining (Café de Jaren, Restaurant Blauw). The guide also notes Amsterdam's overtourism policies under Mayor Femke Halsema, including a €3 tourist tax and Airbnb restrictions.
summary: Amsterdam is a unique blend of world-class museums, historic architecture, and local culture. The city offers a range of experiences, from visiting famous museums like the Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum to exploring charming neighborhoods like the Jordaan. Amsterdam also has a thriving food scene, with options ranging from traditional Dutch cuisine to international flavors.
